text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That was fast. Did you catch the runaway
student?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I gave her a piece of my mind as well. Poor
observance of the dress code leads to poor
discipline, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Strict as ever, I see. I noticed she seemed to be in
pretty good shape...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I expect it was quite a challenge chasing her
down. Good thing you're persistent.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There's a trick to catching up to a rival who has a
head start. I was training for just such a situation
the other day.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? You must be feeling grateful to your
trainer then.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You fool. It's a trainer's job to provide guidance.
Why would I praise them just for doing their
expected duties?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I were to tell my trainer anything, it would be
the difficulties I experienced in order for us to
revise those aspects and further improve my
technique.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And even if I did praise my trainer, I wouldn't want to encourage complacency.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My, my, Empress. You really have taken a shine
to your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Nothing of the sort! All I ask of my trainer is the
bare minimum.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look—that student's shirt is untucked. Are
you going to let that slide?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! You stay right there, and we'll
finish this conversation when I get back!
